rules: accessed_date is stamped at fetch time; a missing or future date blocks the claim from verified
the cited url must be the doc whose text was actually fetched, not a search-result snippet
the extract/paraphrase must be short and faithful to the fetched official passage
a secondary source is cited as role=lead only; never as authority for a verified claim
self_correction: verified claim whose url points to blog/forum/issue/gist/AI-summary -> degrade to unverified
absent or future accessed_date -> demand a real date before continuing
